category_sources: Official Lilv docs describe it as a library for working with LV2 plugins.
source_facts.description says C library to use LV2 plugins.
display_name_sources: Official documentation title and project repository use Lilv.
docs_sources: Official drobilla.net Lilv API documentation is the dedicated documentation surface.
repo_sources: Official GitLab LV2/lilv project describes itself as the LV2 host library and links to drobilla.net/software/lilv.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a C library for LV2 plugins.
source_facts.executables lists LV2 utility commands such as lv2info and lv2ls.
